CustomField.description: Indicates the Balance Due of the invoice line item less the total deferred amount. Payments cannot exceed this amount on the invoice line item. Used when multi-currency is enabled.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicates the Balance Due of the invoice line item less the total deferred amount. Payments cannot exceed this amount on the invoice line item. Used when multi-currency is enabled.
CustomField.label: Non Deferred Balance Due
